basic_details.job_title: TMC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Data Manager, Admin Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Bio-statistician, Data Manager/Assistant, Admin Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website tmc.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the TMC Bio-statistician, Data Manager/Assistant, Admin Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Statistics), Degree in Information Technology, Graduation plus certificate course in computer application
qualification.details: Bio-statistician: M.Sc. (Statistics) with 1-2 years experience preferably in Bio-statistics. Candidates with experience in Data collection and Analysis for clinical studies/ clinical trials in oncology will be given preference. Data Manager/Assistant: Degree in Information Technology with 50% marks. 03 years experience in maintaining database of large-scale clinical studies and proven efficiencies in working on MS Access and SQL database. Basic understanding in statistical analysis of clinical data is desirable. Admin Assistant: Graduation in any stream, plus certificate course (Minimum 6 months duration) in computer application from a recognized institute. Minimum 01-year clerical experience working in a Hospital is desirable.

rows.tata_memorial_centre_tmc: M.Sc. (Statistics), Degree in Information Technology, Graduation plus certificate course in computer application

content_sections.heading: TMC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TMC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TMC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bio-statistician: M.Sc. (Statistics) with 1-2 years experience preferably in Bio-statistics. Candidates with experience in Data collection and Analysis for clinical studies/ clinical trials in oncology will be given preference. Data Manager/Assistant: Degree in Information Technology with 50% marks. 03 years experience in maintaining database of large-scale clinical studies and proven efficiencies in working on MS Access and SQL database. Basic understanding in statistical analysis of clinical data is desirable. Admin Assistant: Graduation in any stream, plus certificate course (Minimum 6 months duration) in computer application from a recognized institute. Minimum 01-year clerical experience working in a Hospital is desirable.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) recruitment is scheduled for 10th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in this TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment drive by Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) offers positions for Bio-statistician, Data Manager/Assistant, and Admin Assistant. There are a total of 3 vacancies across these roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Bio-statistician post?
faq.answer: For the Bio-statistician position, candidates need to have an M.Sc. in Statistics with 1-2 years of relevant experience, preferably in Bio-statistics. Experience in clinical studies or trials in oncology is a plus.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for the TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Data Manager/Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Data Manager/Assistant position at Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) ranges from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 40,000 per month. This is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this TMC job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates do not need to apply online; they must directly attend the interview at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for TMC Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 530053. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for the exact venue address.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions at TMC?
faq.answer: The job type for all the advertised posts (Bio-statistician, Data Manager/Assistant, Admin Assistant) at Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) is Contract.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxations for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any specific details regarding age relaxations.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) recruitment is scheduled for 10th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date with all necessary documents.
